calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-13-2020 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned by Department 206 for Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Puthucode Veeraraghavan, an individual.
Dept: 514. Judge: Gerardo C Sandoval. Clerk: K. Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

Kristen Sleezer, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bank of America, N.A., was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Puthucode Veeraraghavan, an individual.
Plaintiff's complaint filed for Breach of Contract/Common Counts was filed on July 22, 2019.
Defendant's answer to the complaint was filed on August 22, 2019.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was served on February 24, 2020, with trial set for today, July 13, 2020.
Plaintiff's Opening Trial Brief was filed today, July 13, 2020.
DOE defendants were dismissed today, July 13, 2020.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Bank of America, N.A., and against defendant Puthucode Veeraraghavan, an individual, as follows:

Principal/Damages - $24,374.54 (Amount pled in complaint).
Prejudgment Interest - Waived.
Attorney Fees - Waived.
Costs - $459.66.

Total - $24,834.20.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-13-2020 Assigned To Trial Court

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-24-2020 Set For Trial On Jul-13-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
